Nuclear power as AI data center infrastructure play; scanner classifies CEG as utility, missing the hyperscaler PPA thesis that makes this the most defensible AI power play
Six C-suite executives buying simultaneously — scanner saw individual Form 4s but the coordinated same-day cluster signal requires human pattern recognition across multiple filings
Specialty insurance compounder with founder $3.9M buy; scanner likely excluded insurance sector from discovery pipeline due to lack of traditional catalysts
Lawrence Culp's $5M personal buy is the most significant single insider buy in healthcare 2026; scanner may have captured smaller insider buys but missed the magnitude/significance of the Culp signal
Newly-spun company with only 5 analysts; CEO $6.4M cluster buy at spinoff lows; scanner lacks spinoff-specific detection logic for re-rating opportunities
First OEM-qualified US heavy REE production in decades (March 2026); requires connecting China REE policy + DFARS mandate + OEM qualification milestone — synthesis impossible with keyword scanning
Multi-class tanker operator capturing all legs of Hormuz disruption simultaneously; scanner lacks the geopolitical-to-sector-beneficiary synthesis needed to identify tanker plays
Argentina ADR with Druckenmiller 433% stake increase; scanner likely filtered on geopolitical risk or ADR complexity, missing the Vaca Muerta + LNG FID convergence thesis
